lede: A look at December 16 through the almanac — historic events, famous birthdays including Ludwig van Beethoven and Leopold I of Belgium, and the day's notable deaths and observances.

events.title: Dennō Senshi Porygon
events.desc: Dennō Senshi Porygon: Over 600 kids in Japan suffer photosensitive epileptic seizures after watching an episode of the Pokémon anime.

events.title: Bahrain
events.desc: The United Kingdom recognizes Bahrain's independence, which is commemorated annually as Bahrain's National Day.

events.title: World War II
events.desc: World War II: The Battle of the Bulge begins with the surprise offensive of three German armies through the Ardennes forest.

events.title: The Holocaust
events.desc: The Holocaust: Schutzstaffel chief Heinrich Himmler orders that Roma candidates for extermination be deported to Auschwitz.

events.title: 1920 Haiyuan earthquake
events.desc: The Haiyuan earthquake of 8.5Mw rocks the Gansu province in China, killing an estimated 200,000.

events.title: World War I
events.desc: World War I: Admiral Franz von Hipper commands a raid on Scarborough, Hartlepool and Whitby.

events.title: 1811–1812 New Madrid earthquakes
events.desc: The first two in a series of four severe earthquakes occur in the vicinity of New Madrid, Missouri.

events.title: American Revolution
events.desc: American Revolution: Boston Tea Party: Members of the Sons of Liberty disguised as Mohawk Indians dump hundreds of crates of tea into Boston harbor as a protest against the Tea Act.

events.title: Seven Years' War
events.desc: Seven Years' War: After a four-month siege, the Russians under Pyotr Rumyantsev take the Prussian fortress of Kołobrzeg.

events.title: Hōei eruption
events.desc: The most recent eruption of Mount Fuji.

births.name: Leopold I of Belgium
births.line: King of the Belgians from 1831 to 1865

deaths.text: Gabriel Narutowicz, Lithuanian–Polish engineer and politician, 1st President of the Republic of Poland
François Quesnay, French economist, physician, and philosopher
Wu Zetian, Empress of the Zhou dynasty

observances.text: Christian feast day: Blessed Philip Siphong Onphitak
Christian feast day: Ralph Adams Cram, Richard Upjohn and John La Farge (Episcopal Church (USA))
Day of Reconciliation, formerly celebrated as Day of the Vow by the Afrikaners (South Africa)
Independence Day, celebrates the independence of Kazakhstan from the Soviet Union in 1991.
